entry.title: If Only You Knew
entry.summary:
Author: Fiction_is_the_new_reality

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,152Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 378

Summary: Growing up in Gotham you and Jason were inseparable. At 17 you lose your best now. Now years later you’re faced with a new threat in Gotham and you might have a history with them.

entry.title: Writing Prompt
entry.summary:
Author: darkdustyblue

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,283Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Jason is studying for his PHD, Siena is a Criminal Justice major. Both have family trauma, both hate life, both decide to become friends. They will smash later, maybe I'll do some friends to enemies to lovers or something. We will see.

entry.title: distraction
entry.summary:
Author: dudleykins

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,483Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: You squinted your eyes at him. "I'm on to your little tricks, you know." "What tricks?" He pulled you flush, mouth finding yours. His kiss was playful, slightly tugging on your lower lip. You were going to protest. You really were. But when his tongue found its way into your mouth, languidly stroking back and forth, whatever you were going to say seemed far less important. or dermatillomania is no fun. but when jason kisses you — you hardly remember the pain anymore.

entry.summary:
Author: ddottodd

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,883Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 58

entry.title: Suffocate
entry.summary:
Author: AristoMuse

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,052Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,560Chapters: 3/25Kudos: 46

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books.Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood.Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.title: OMNISCIENT
entry.summary:
Author: jennysketchup

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,290Chapters: 6/45Kudos: 53

Summary: Death and Destiny are star-crossed lovers; they're bound for eternity but are subject to Fate and her imposing presence. You were once an admirer of Fate; the idea of an inescapable future buried a sense of security within you. That was until fate decided it had other plans for you. Gosh... you hate being OMNISCIENT.

entry.title: Getting Around Gotham, or: Five Drabble Trysts with Batfam Men, and One 3500 Word Epilogue About How You All Realized It
entry.summary:
Author: gone (relocation)

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 300Chapters: 3/6Kudos: 14

Summary: A fresh arrival in Gotham and trying to meet new people, you find yourself entangled with five different men, unaware that they are all connected, just as they are unaware of each other's connection to you, until you all end up at one party. (In your defence, they all had different surnames.) - Updating Mondays and Fridays- Inspired by every time I've thought "What if someone dated everyone in the Batfam, and never realized it because they all have different surnames?"- Written for the characters in general, most recently (but certainly not only) influenced by WFA- Only Jason got outright smut, sorry Dick et al.- Drabbles can pretty much be enjoyed separately, but they are meant to be read together with the longer epilogue.- Titled edited. Originally 3300 word epilogue but decide to go for a 3500 for a nice clean 4k total.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.summary:
Author: dalgikiss

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 71,991Chapters: 50/54Kudos: 366

Summary: [Jason Todd x fem!spoiled!girly!civilian!reader] you are a ghost as i am a ghost, but i am banging cabinets and tv static and all you’ve ever been is silent // in which Bruce's spoiled daughter is loved beyond measure and jason is unsure where he fits in a world that she isn't allowed to know exists. But he's has never been good at walking away from things that could break him.
